links.alt: born of the bones of the earth
links.name: born of the bones of the earth

feat.name: Raise Island
feat.prerequisite: *born of the bones of the earth* or *restless as the tides*
feat.text: You churn the sea and fish up stone so your enemies together can receive their punishment. Each enemy in a 30-foot emanation must succeed at a Fortitude save against your class DC or be swept up to 15 feet to another location of your choice within the affected area and become off-guard until the start of your next turn. Then, if you’re on a surface, a pillar of earth rises underneath you and lasts for 1 minute. The pillar is 10 feet tall, and its surface includes your space and a 5-foot emanation around you. After the pillar rises, you can attempt a melee Strike against one enemy in reach.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

traits.name: Divine
traits.text:
This magic comes from the divine tradition, drawing power from deities or similar sources. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to divine magic.

traits.name: Exemplar
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the exemplar class.
